--border:rgba(26,18,8,0.1);--blue:#1a56db; } body{background:var(--bg);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--dark);min-height:100vh;} /* LOGIN */ #loginScreen{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--dark);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9999;} .login-box{background:var(--panel);border-radius:20px;padding:44px 40px;width:340px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);} .login-box img{height:52px;margin-bottom:28px;} .login-box h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;color:white;margin-bottom:6px;} .login-box p{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);margin-bottom:28px;} .login-input{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 16px;color:white;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;outline:none;text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.15em;margin-bottom:12px;transition:border-color 0.2s;} .login-input:focus{border-color:var(--amber);} .btn-login{width:100%;background:var(--coral);border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;color:white;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.2s;} .btn-login:hover{background:#c73a07;} .login-err{font-size:12px;color:#f87171;margin-top:10px;display:none;} /* TOPBAR */ .topbar{background:var(--dark);padding:0 28px;height:56px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;display:none;} .topbar img{height:36px;} .topbar-center{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-style:italic;} .btn-logout{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:all 0.15s;} .btn-logout:hover{border-color:var(--coral);color:var(--coral);} /* MAIN */ #mainScreen{display:none;} .wrapper{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:28px 20px 80px;} /* TABS BAR */ .tabs-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .tab-btn{background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px 10px 0 0;padding:9px 18px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gray);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;position:relative;} .tab-btn.active{background:var(--coral);border-color:var(--coral);color:white;} .tab-btn:not(.active):hover{border-color:var(--coral);color:var(--coral);} .tab-close{font-size:14px;opacity:0.6;line-height:1;margin-left:2px;} .tab-close:hover{opacity:1;} .btn-add-tab{background:rgba(232,69,10,0.08);border:1.5px dashed var(--coral);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--coral);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .btn-add-tab:hover{background:var(--coral);color:white;} /* EXPORT ALL */ .export-bar{background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 20px;margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;} .export-bar-info{font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);} .export-bar-info strong{color:var(--dark);} .btn-export-all{background:var(--panel);border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:10px 20px;color:white;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;} .btn-export-all:hover{background:#1d3840;} .btn-export-all:disabled{opacity:0.5;cursor:not-allowed;} /* CARD */ .card{background:white;border-radius:14px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:24px;margin-bottom:16px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(26,18,8,0.04);} .card-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;} .card-title .icon{font-size:17px;} /* FORM */ .form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;} .form-grid-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:14px;} .field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;} .field.full{grid-column:1/-1;} .field-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gray);letter-spacing:0.5px;text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;} .tip-icon{width:15px;height:15px;background:rgba(46,74,82,0.12);border-radius:50%;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--panel);font-weight:700;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;} .tip-icon:hover .tooltip{display:block;} .tooltip{display:none;position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 6px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--panel);color:white;font-size:11px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;width:220px;z-index:50;font-weight:400;line-height:1.5;white-space:normal;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);} .tooltip::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:100%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);border:5px solid transparent;border-top-color:var(--panel);} input[type=text],input[type=number],select,textarea{ background:#F5F3EE;border:1.5px solid rgba(26,18,8,0.1);border-radius:9px; padding:10px 13px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--dark); outline:none;transition:border-color 0.15s;width:100%; } input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--coral);} textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:75px;} /* VIP toggle */ .vip-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:11px 15px;background:rgba(245,166,35,0.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.2);border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;margin-top:14px;user-select:none;} .vip-row input[type=checkbox]{width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:var(--amber);cursor:pointer;} .vip-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#a06b00;} /* CATEGORIAS */ .cat-row{background:#FAFAF8;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:10px;} .cat-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;} .cat-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--dark);} .nota-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;} .nota-btn{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:7px;border:1.5px solid rgba(26,18,8,0.12);background:white;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.15s;color:var(--gray);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;} .nota-btn.active{background:var(--coral);border-color:var(--coral);color:white;} .nota-btn:hover:not(.active){border-color:var(--coral);color:var(--coral);} .nota-txt{font-size:11px;color:var(--gray);margin-left:4px;min-width:90px;} .cat-fields{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;} /* SIGNATURE PAD */ .sig-wrap{border:1.5px solid rgba(26,18,8,0.1);border-radius:9px;background:#F5F3EE;position:relative;overflow:hidden;} .sig-canvas{display:block;cursor:crosshair;touch-action:none;} .sig-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;} .btn-clear-sig{background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;} .btn-clear-sig:hover{border-color:var(--coral);color:var(--coral);} .sig-hint{font-size:11px;color:var(--gray);font-style:italic;margin-top:4px;} /* ACTIONS */ .actions{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:4px;} .btn-primary{flex:1;background:var(--coral);border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;color:white;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;} .btn-primary:hover{background:#c73a07;} .btn-primary:disabled{opacity:0.5;cursor:not-allowed;} .btn-secondary{background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 20px;color:var(--gray);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--coral);color:var(--coral);} /* PROGRESS */ .progress-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(26,18,8,0.7);z-index:9998;align-items:center;justify-content:center;} .progress-overlay.show{display:flex;} .progress-box{background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:32px 40px;text-align:center;min-width:280px;} .progress-box h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:8px;} .progress-box p{font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);} .progress-bar-wrap{background:#F5F3EE;border-radius:99px;height:6px;margin-top:16px;overflow:hidden;} .progress-bar-fill{background:var(--coral);height:100%;border-radius:99px;transition:width 0.3s;width:0%;} /* ===================== RELATÓRIO ===================== */ #reportArea{position:fixed;left:-9999px;top:0;visibility:hidden;} .report-page{ width:794px;background:white; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:#1A1208; } .rh{background:#1A1208;padding:0;} .rh img{height:32px;flex-shrink:0;} .rh-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:20px 28px 16px;} .rh-tag{font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);} .rh-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:900;color:white;line-height:1.05;text-align:right;} .rh-vip{display:inline-block;background:var(--amber);color:var(--dark);font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;} .rh-meta{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);padding:8px 28px;display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0;} .rh-meta-item{font-size:8.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);padding-right:14px;margin-right:14px;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);white-space:nowrap;} .rh-meta-item:last-child{border-right:none;} .rh-meta-item strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);font-weight:600;} .rbar{height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#E8450A,#F5A623);} .rstats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;border-bottom:2px solid #f0ede8;} .rstat{padding:12px 16px;border-right:1px solid #f0ede8;} .rstat:last-child{border-right:none;} .rstat-lbl{font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7A6B5A;margin-bottom:3px;} .rstat-val{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#1A1208;line-height:1;} .rstat-val.orange{color:#E8450A;} .rstat-unit{font-size:9px;color:#7A6B5A;margin-top:1px;} .rsit{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:99px;display:inline-block;margin-top:3px;} .rsit.aprovado{background:#d1fae5;color:#065f46;} .rsit.andamento{background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e;} .rsit.reprovado{background:#fee2e2;color:#991b1b;} .rsit.reforco{background:#ede9fe;color:#5b21b6;} .reforco-fields{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;padding:12px 14px;background:#f5f3ff;border:1.5px solid #ddd6fe;border-radius:10px;} .reforco-fields.hidden{display:none;} .rreforco{margin:0 18px 12px;background:#f5f3ff;border:1px solid #ddd6fe;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;} .rreforco-lbl{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5b21b6;margin-bottom:6px;} .rreforco-row{display:flex;gap:20px;font-size:10px;color:#1A1208;} .rbody{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 190px;} .rleft{padding:14px 18px;} .rright{padding:14px;border-left:1px solid #f0ede8;} .rcat{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:11px;padding-bottom:11px;border-bottom:1px solid #f5f3f0;} .rcat:last-child{border-bottom:none;margin-bottom:0;padding-bottom:0;} .rcat-score-wrap{flex-shrink:0;width:38px;text-align:center;} .rcat-score-num{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;line-height:1;} .rcat-score-den{font-size:8px;color:#aaa;font-weight:400;} .rcat-score-bar{width:38px;height:5px;background:#eee;border-radius:99px;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;} .rcat-score-fill{height:100%;border-radius:99px;} .score-red{color:#dc2626;}.score-yellow{color:#d97706;}.score-green{color:#059669;} .fill-red{background:#dc2626;}.fill-yellow{background:#d97706;}.fill-green{background:#059669;} .rcat-body{flex:1;} .rcat-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#E8450A;margin-bottom:2px;} .rcat-text{font-size:9.5px;color:#1A1208;line-height:1.45;margin-bottom:3px;} .rcat-next{font-size:9px;color:#2E4A52;font-style:italic;} .rradar-lbl{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7A6B5A;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px;} .rright-cefr{margin-top:12px;background:#EEF2FF;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;} .rright-cefr-lbl{font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#4338ca;margin-bottom:2px;} .rright-cefr-val{font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:#4338ca;} .rright-aprov{margin-top:10px;background:#d1fae5;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;} .rright-aprov-txt{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#065f46;} .robs{margin:0 18px 12px;background:#FBF7F0;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;} .robs-lbl{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#E8450A;margin-bottom:5px;} .robs-txt{font-size:10px;color:#1A1208;line-height:1.6;} .rmetas{margin:0 18px 12px;border:1px solid #E8F4FD;background:#F0F9FF;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;} .rmetas-lbl{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#0369a1;margin-bottom:5px;} .rmetas-txt{font-size:10px;color:#1A1208;line-height:1.6;} .rfooter{border-top:1px solid #f0ede8;padding:12px 18px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;} .rfooter-lbl{font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7A6B5A;margin-bottom:5px;} .rfooter-val{font-size:10px;color:#1A1208;font-weight:600;} .rsig-line{border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;height:32px;} .rcheck-row{display:flex;gap:14px;font-size:9.5px;color:#1A1208;margin-top:4px;} .rcheck-box{width:10px;height:10px;border:1px solid #999;display:inline-block;margin-right:3px;vertical-align:middle;} .rbrand{font-size:8px;color:#7A6B5A;text-align:center;padding:6px 0 10px;} .rqr-section{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:0 18px 12px;padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid #f0ede8;border-radius:10px;} .rqr-text{} .rqr-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--panel);margin-bottom:2px;} .rqr-sub{font-size:8.5px;color:#7A6B5A;line-height:1.4;}
